accurate.why: All claims match; WOTUS 15-day guidance, 60-day baseline, IRA (PL 117-169) reductions, NGA/FERC amendment, SPR-China ban all verified.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabrication; 'entities of concern' and procurement restrictions present in text.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Details CALFED/drought extensions, WIIN, IIJA, NGA amendment, IRA reductions.

exceptions_conditions.why: Lists fund restrictions and carve-outs comprehensively.

effective_dates.why: Notes Sept 30, 2025 and 2026 availability, 15-day and 60-day deadlines.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all titles, agencies, riders, and amendments.

concise.why: Dense but no filler given bill size.

correct_entities.why: All agencies and statutes named correctly.

correct_figures.why: States few dollar figures; those (dates/deadlines) are correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
